'''pakanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:craber|craber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:craber|craber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pakanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækængæth|pækængæth]] || [[word:pækængæj|pækængæj]] || [[word:pækængæsh|pækængæsh]] || [[word:pækængæ|pækængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakakangath|pakakangath]] || [[word:pakakangaj|pakakangaj]] || [[word:pakakangash|pakakangash]] || [[word:pakakanga|pakakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakangath|pakangath]] || [[word:pakangaj|pakangaj]] || [[word:pakangash|pakangash]] || [[word:pakanga|pakanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakafngath|pakafngath]] || [[word:pakafngaj|pakafngaj]] || [[word:pakafngash|pakafngash]] || [[word:pakafngaf|pakafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakangatha|pakangatha]] || [[word:pakangaja|pakangaja]] || [[word:pakangasha|pakangasha]] || [[word:pakangaka|pakangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakangath|pakangath]] || [[word:pakangaj|pakangaj]] || [[word:pakangash|pakangash]] || [[word:pakanga|pakanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakangathal|pakangathal]] || [[word:pakangajal|pakangajal]] || [[word:pakangashal|pakangashal]] || [[word:pakangakal|pakangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakangathatha|pakangathatha]] || [[word:pakangajaja|pakangajaja]] || [[word:pakangashasha|pakangashasha]] || [[word:pakangaka|pakangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakangathan|pakangathan]] || [[word:pakangajan|pakangajan]] || [[word:pakangashan|pakangashan]] || [[word:pakangakan|pakangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakangathaoro|pakangathaoro]] || [[word:pakangajaoro|pakangajaoro]] || [[word:pakangashaoro|pakangashaoro]] || [[word:pakangakaoro|pakangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
